items.name: DeepSpeed
items.description: Deep learning optimization library that makes distributed training and inference easy, efficient, and effective.

items.name: Horovod
items.description: Distributed deep learning training framework for TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, and Apache MXNet.

items.name: Kubeflow MPI Operator
items.description: MPI Operator to manage all-reduce distributed training and HPC workloads.

items.name: Megatron-LM
items.description: GPU optimized techniques for training transformer models at-scale

items.name: Open MPI
items.description: A High Performance Message Passing Library

items.name: Pytorch DistributedDataParallel (DDP)
items.description: DistributedDataParallel (DDP) implements data parallelism at the module level which can run across multiple machines.

items.name: Tensorflow Distributed
items.description: TensorFlow API to distribute training across multiple GPUs, multiple machines, or TPUs. Using this API, you can distribute your existing models and training code with minimal code changes.

items.name: Torchx
items.description: Universal job launcher for PyTorch applications. TorchX is designed to have fast iteration time for training/research and support for E2E production ML pipelines when you're ready.
